title: Everything You Need to Know About Selling Design Assets with Crypto Payments — No PayPal Required
author: Unchained Commerce
excerpt: Selling ebooks, courses, templates, fonts, and digital downloads with automated delivery and crypto payments — no platform middleman required.

content.text: Imagine you're a graphic designer in Kenya, with a portfolio full of beautiful templates and fonts. You've spent hours perfecting your craft, and you're ready to sell your designs online. But when you try to set up a payment system with PayPal or Stripe, you hit a roadblock. These popular payment processors are blocked in Kenya, due to banking restrictions and KYC requirements. You're left with a choice: give up on your dreams or find a way to get paid in crypto. That's where Unchained Commerce comes in – we're here to help you sell your design assets using crypto payments, no PayPal required.
What This Actually Is and Why It Matters

Selling design assets online is a lucrative business, but it requires a reliable payment system. In many countries, including Kenya, popular payment processors like PayPal and Stripe are blocked due to banking restrictions and KYC requirements. This means that designers like you are unable to collect payment for their work. Unchained Commerce fills this gap by providing a payment system that accepts crypto, allowing you to get paid in the currency of your choice. Our system is fully automated, so you don't have to worry about handling payments manually.
How the Technology Works Under the Hood

Our payment system uses blockchain technology to facilitate crypto transactions. When a customer buys your design asset, they send the payment to your wallet using a unique QR code. Our system then verifies the payment and delivers the asset to the customer instantly. We use the Web3 Wallet Connect integration to make this process seamless and secure. Our system is built on the NOWPayments platform, which supports over 300 cryptocurrencies, including popular coins like Bitcoin, Ethereum, and USDT.
Who This Is Built For and Why

Our payment system is designed for digital creators like you, who are looking for a reliable and secure way to sell their design assets online. Whether you're a graphic designer, a UI/UX designer, or a digital artist, our system is perfect for anyone who wants to get paid in crypto. We understand that you're not tech-savvy, so our system is designed to be easy to use and requires minimal setup. Simply create an account, connect your wallet, and start selling your design assets today!
Don't let banking restrictions hold you back from selling your design assets online.
The Components That Make It Work Together

Our payment system consists of three key components: the Web3 Wallet Connect integration, the NOWPayments platform, and our automated delivery system. The Web3 Wallet Connect integration allows customers to pay using their favorite cryptocurrencies, while the NOWPayments platform supports over 300 cryptocurrencies and provides real-time price feeds. Our automated delivery system ensures that the asset is delivered to the customer instantly, once the payment is verified.
How to Use This Knowledge to Take Action

Now that you know how our payment system works, it's time to take action! First, create an account with Unchained Commerce and connect your wallet. Next, set up your store and start listing your design assets. Finally, share your store with your audience and start selling your design assets today! Remember, our system is fully automated, so you don't have to worry about handling payments manually. Simply focus on creating amazing design assets and get paid in crypto!
How do I sell an ebook online without PayPal?

The fastest path to your first crypto-native digital product sale is a three-step process. First, set up NOWPayments — create an account, configure your wallet address, get your API key. Second, deploy the Core Shop Engine with your product file and NOWPayments credentials. Third, configure Web3 Wallet Connect with your checkout settings and product details. At that point, your store accepts crypto payments and delivers the product automatically. The complete setup, following the included deployment guide, takes most creators two to four hours from start to first test transaction. The Full Stack Bundle at $79.99 includes all three components plus the deployment guide and support access. For a creator who cannot use PayPal or Stripe, this is the infrastructure that makes selling digital products viable.
Our payment system is designed to be easy to use and requires minimal setup.
Related: How Creators Like You Are Getting Paid

If you're interested in learning more about blockchain technology and its applications, check out our guide to blockchain for beginners. We also have a range of resources available on our website, including tutorials and webinars on how to use our payment system. Our Web3 Wallet Connect integration is also compatible with a range of other products, including our Core Shop Engine and Admin Dashboard.
Your Action Checklist

Here's a step-by-step checklist to help you get started with our payment system: 1. Create an account with Unchained Commerce and connect your wallet. 2. Set up your store and start listing your design assets. 3. Share your store with your audience and start selling your design assets today! 4. Monitor your sales and adjust your pricing as needed. 5. Experiment with new design assets and grow your customer base.
Get paid in crypto and take control of your financial freedom.
Web3 Wallet Connect — $19.99. Frontend wallet integration with multi-chain QR generation and live price feeds. Let buyers pay in BTC, ETH, USDT, SOL, and 300 more coins.
